nasb.text: Then Lamech lived five hundred and ninety-five years after he became the father of Noah, and he had other sons and daughters.

esv.text: Lamech lived after he fathered Noah 595 years and had other sons and daughters.

cnv.text: 拉麥生挪亞以後，還活了五百九十五年，並且生了其他的兒女。

ccb.text: 拉麦生挪亚之后，又活了五百九十五年，生儿育女，

csbs.text: 拉麦生了挪亚之后，又活了五百九十五年，并且生了其他的儿女。
